title: Neural Aggregate Formation Protocol
author: Celeste M M. Karch
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.x84fryw

steps.title: Harvest iPSCs for neural aggregate formation...
steps.instruction: Harvest iPSCs for neural aggregate formation when iPSCs have reached 75- 85% confluency. Aspirate medium and rinse with 2 mL of DPBS.

steps.title: Add 1 mL of Accutase
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL of Accutase. Incubate at 37 °C for 00:05:00 . Gently tap plate to dislodge cells.

steps.title: Dilute Accutase with 4 mL of...
steps.instruction: Dilute Accutase with 4 mL of DMEM/F12 medium and collect cell suspension in 15ml conical tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge cells at 750 rpm for 00:03:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge cells at 750 rpm for 00:03:00 . Then carefully aspirate medium from iPSC pellet.

steps.title: Add 3 mL of neural induction medium to iPSC pellet
steps.instruction: Add 3 mL of neural induction medium to iPSC pellet. Using a hemacytometer, count iPSCs. Adjust volume of iPSC suspension to 450-650,000 cells/mL using neural induction medium supplemented Rock inhibitor (10 μM final).

steps.title: Add 100 µL of iPSC suspension...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL of iPSC suspension per well to a v-bottom 96-well plate.

steps.title: Centrifuge plate at 750 rpm for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge plate at 750 rpm for 00:03:00 to sediment iPSC into spheres.

steps.title: Incubate cells at 37 °C ,...
steps.instruction: Incubate cells at 37 °C , 5% CO2 and 95% humidified chamber for 24:00:00 . After 24 hrs, carefully remove all medium from well and replace with 100 µL per well of Neural Induction Medium. Do not disturb or break apart spheres. The spheres are very delicate at this stage.

steps.title: Incubate neurospheres in 96 well plate for 96:00:00
steps.instruction: Incubate neurospheres in 96 well plate for 96:00:00 . Perform half volume medium changes daily (removed 50 µL and replace with 50 µL ).
